title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Acuite Ratings - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Acuite Ratings - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
